import React, { useState } from "react"; import { Collapse, Button } from 'reactstrap'; import { BsCaretDownFill, BsFillCaretUpFill } from "react-icons/bs"; import wiproLogo from "../assets/company_logos/wipro.jpeg"; import amazonLogo from "../assets/company_logos/amazon.png"; import byjus from "../assets/company_logos/byjus.png" import cognizant from flipcart from "../assets/company_logos/flipcart.jpg" import hp from "../assets/company_logos/hp.jpg" const PastRecruiters = props => { const [isOpenFirst] = useState(true); const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false); const toggle = () => { setIsOpen(!isOpen) } return (
